text: Here, I sense the intersection of thought and creation, where the mundane corridors of work dissolve into an environment awash with color and idea. There is a playfulness to the display—an invitation to participate in the unfolding of the future. The words about uncertainty and possibility resonate with me; I feel a light anticipation, balanced between the sterile security of the meeting room and the vibrant curiosity evoked by this R+D showcase. Being here, I am caught in transition—inspired, a little unsettled, quietly hopeful.
